colors.name: Soft Warm Neutrals
colors.description: Including muted beiges, gentle greys, and creamy off-whites, often forming a calming and sophisticated base.

colors.name: Earthy Tones
colors.description: Such as terracotta, olive green, dusty rose, and muted blues, connecting to nature and providing a grounding feel.

colors.name: Bold, Playful Colors
colors.description: Vibrant and energetic hues like mustard yellow, emerald green, deep teals, and rich berry tones used as accents or for statement pieces.

colors.name: Pastels with Depth
colors.description: More sophisticated variations of traditional pastels, like dusty lavender, sage green, and muted peach.

colors.name: Deep Jewel Tones
colors.description: Rich and luxurious colors like sapphire blue, amethyst purple, and ruby red, used sparingly for impact and elegance.

styles.name: Japandi
styles.description: A harmonious blend of Japanese minimalism and Scandinavian warmth, emphasizing clean lines, natural materials, and a serene atmosphere.

styles.name: Montessori Inspired
styles.description: Focuses on creating an environment that fosters independence, exploration, and learning. Low-to-the-ground furniture, accessible storage, and natural materials are key.

styles.name: Nature-Inspired / Biophilic
styles.description: Bringing the outdoors in with natural elements, patterns, and colors. Think botanical prints, wooden accents, and earthy palettes.

styles.name: Playful Modern
styles.description: Combines clean modern aesthetics with bold colors, whimsical patterns, and imaginative themes, often incorporating modular or multi-functional furniture.

styles.name: Whimsical Fantasy
styles.description: Themes like enchanted forests, outer space adventures, or fairy tales, often with hand-painted murals, themed textiles, and unique decorative elements.

styles.name: Vintage/Retro Revival
styles.description: Incorporating elements reminiscent of mid-century modern or 70s aesthetics, with vibrant colors, geometric patterns, and unique furniture shapes.

styles.name: Geometric Minimalism
styles.description: Clean lines, geometric patterns, and a pared-down aesthetic, often with a focus on functionality and clear space.

brands.name: Oliver Furniture
brands.aesthetic: nordische Leichtigkeit — filigree forms, light birch and white, 100% Made in Europe

brands.name: Paidi
brands.aesthetic: climate-neutral, toxin-free, mitwachsende Möbel (furniture that grows with the child)

brands.name: IKEA
brands.aesthetic: practical base furniture, popular Kura and Kallax combinations

baby.label: Baby (0–3 years)
baby.furniture: low Bodenbett floor bed or classic crib, soft padded rug, mobile above bed — all furniture very low
baby.storage: low open shelves at floor level, small rattan baskets, no climbing structures
baby.extras: soft stuffed animals, wooden mobile, nightlight, linen curtains

vorschul.label: Preschool (3–6 years)
vorschul.furniture: simple low single bed, small play table with two chairs, open shelving at child height
vorschul.storage: Kallax-style open shelving with toy bins at child level, small rattan baskets
vorschul.extras: building blocks, wooden toys, small bookshelf, soft floor rug

schulkind.label: School age (6–10 years)
schulkind.furniture: single bed, desk with chair and task lamp, small bookshelf
schulkind.storage: combination of open and closed storage, wall shelves for books
schulkind.extras: desk lamp, school backpack hook, reading corner with bean bag

teenager.label: Teenager (10–16 years)
teenager.furniture: low single bed or sofa-bed, full desk setup, ergonomic chair, shelving with books and decor
teenager.storage: modular wall shelves, closed wardrobe, desk organizer
teenager.extras: plants, posters, LED ambient lighting strip, headphones on desk stand, minimal personal items

keyObjects.name: Bodenbett
keyObjects.description: Montessori floor bed at ground level — baby can get in and out independently, very low profile, wallpaper wall fully visible above

keyObjects.name: Kinderbett mit Gitterstäben
keyObjects.description: classic wooden crib with slatted sides, placed against wallpaper wall — simple and safe for infants

keyObjects.name: Kuschelecke mit Spielmatte
keyObjects.description: soft play mat on the floor with a few plush toys and a low rattan shelf — open and airy, wallpaper wall as backdrop

keyObjects.name: Spieltisch mit Stühlen
keyObjects.description: small children's play table with two small chairs — creative zone in front of the wallpaper wall, building blocks and art supplies

keyObjects.name: Einzelbett mit Baldachin
keyObjects.description: simple low single bed with a fabric canopy above — fairy-tale atmosphere, headboard against wallpaper wall

keyObjects.name: Spielecke mit Regal
keyObjects.description: open play zone with low Kallax-style shelving unit displaying toys, woven baskets and books — wallpaper fills the entire back wall

keyObjects.name: Leseecke mit Sitzsack
keyObjects.description: cozy reading corner — large bean bag or floor cushion, bookshelf at child height, wall lamp, wallpaper wall as full backdrop

keyObjects.name: Schreibtisch-Ecke
keyObjects.description: children's desk with chair, task lamp and small open shelf — homework zone with wallpaper wall visible behind

keyObjects.name: Einzelbett mit Kopfteil-Regal
keyObjects.description: low single bed with integrated headboard shelf for books and a small lamp — calm and organized, wallpaper wall above headboard

keyObjects.name: Teenager Schreibtisch mit All-in-One PC
keyObjects.description: modern desk setup: wide wooden desk, All-in-One PC with screen turned off, appearing as a clean blank matte dark screen with no glossy reflections, sleek desk lamp, small plant, minimal accessories — wallpaper wall dominant as full backdrop behind the setup

keyObjects.name: Gaming-Ecke
keyObjects.description: teenager gaming setup: ergonomic chair, wide desk, 27" curved monitor with screen turned off, appearing as a clean blank matte dark screen with no glossy reflections, mechanical keyboard, subtle warm lighting — modern and stylish, wallpaper wall fills the background

keyObjects.name: Teenager Bett mit Lese-Ecke
keyObjects.description: low single bed plus a small reading nook area beside it — a poster or plant on the desk, wallpaper wall visible behind

roomZones.name: sleep zone
roomZones.description: bed as focal point against the wallpaper wall, calm and cozy atmosphere

roomZones.name: play zone
roomZones.description: open floor space, low shelves with toys, wallpaper visible as full backdrop

roomZones.name: reading nook
roomZones.description: small armchair or bean bag, floor lamp or wall lamp, wallpaper prominently behind

roomZones.name: study zone
roomZones.description: desk as focal point against the wallpaper wall, focused and minimal atmosphere — wallpaper fills the background

lighting.name: warm afternoon sunlight
lighting.description: 15:00 soft sunlight through linen curtains, golden tones, gentle shadows on parquet

lighting.name: overcast Nordic daylight
lighting.description: diffused cloudy light, even and cool, no harsh shadows — typical German autumn day

lighting.name: warm pendant lamp at dusk
lighting.description: evening, main ceiling lamp glowing warm amber, cozy Gemütlichkeit atmosphere

lighting.name: morning soft light
lighting.description: early morning, pale soft sunlight, fresh and calm

lighting.name: fairy lights evening
lighting.description: dark outside, warm fairy lights strung around the room, magical cozy mood

lighting.name: golden hour
lighting.description: sunset light streaming in at low angle, rich warm gold tones across the room

cameraAngles: frontal — straight-on view of the wallpaper wall
corner view — shot from corner of room, two walls visible, wallpaper wall dominant
side view — shot from the side, wallpaper wall in the background

cameraDistances.name: close-up
cameraDistances.description: shows wallpaper pattern in detail plus one furniture piece, pattern texture clearly visible

cameraDistances.name: medium shot
cameraDistances.description: main furniture piece and full wallpaper wall visible, balanced composition

cameraDistances.name: wide shot
cameraDistances.description: full room view, wallpaper as backdrop, full spatial context

depthOfField.name: shallow depth of field
depthOfField.description: foreground accessory sharp, wallpaper wall softly in focus — draws eye to pattern

depthOfField.name: medium depth of field
depthOfField.description: bed and wall both sharp, slight background blur — balanced interior shot

depthOfField.name: deep depth of field
depthOfField.description: entire room sharp from foreground to wall — used for wide shots showing full context

accessories: Wall decals and removable wallpaper (animal, botanical, geometric patterns)
Open shelving for book and toy display
Plant hangers with indoor plants (child-safe varieties)

germanApartmentContext.windows: large window with deep sill, typical German apartment style

negativePrompt: no beige monotony, no cold grey tones, no plastic toys, no sharp furniture corners, no visual noise, no chaos boho, no gallery walls, no full-length mirrors, no fluorescent lighting, no cluttered surfaces, no bunk beds, no loft beds with ladders, no Hochbett mit Leiter, no two-story beds, no elevated sleeping platforms with ladders
